metadata.description: DeployIfNotExists, AuditIfNotExists or Disabled the execution of the Policy
The name of the Network Security Perimeter resource, e.g. 'nsp-germanywestcentral'
The resource group where the Network Security Perimeter is deployed, e.g. 'rg-nsp-platform'

The full resource ID of the NSP profile to associate storage accounts with, e.g. /subscriptions/{sub}/resourceGroups/{rg}/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityPerimeters/{nspName}/profiles/{profileName}

The access mode for the NSP resource association. 'Learning' (also known as Transition) allows existing firewall rules to continue working alongside NSP rules. 'Enforced' restricts access to NSP rules only.
The Azure region where the NSP is deployed. Only storage accounts in this region will be associated. Must match the NSP location, e.g. 'germanywestcentral'
